# SotuRail

SotuRail is a local-first Context OS for AI coding agents. It prepares evidence, context, memory, workflow records, reports and safe agent handoffs without cloud telemetry.

Useful entry points:

- README.md
- ROADMAP.md
- docs/rails/hosts/agents.md
- docs/getting-started/quickstart.md
- docs/reference/contracts/v1-contract.md
- docs/reference/schemas/schema-contracts.md
- docs/rails/knowledge/project-brain.md
- docs/rails/evaluation/benchmarking.md
- docs/rails/evidence/report-rail.md
- docs/architecture/dashboard-rail.md
- docs/architecture/observability-rail.md
- docs/rails/hosts/mcp-report-resources.md
- docs/releases/
